bio1: I'm a graphic designer with 5+ years of experience across poster design, social media content, pitch deck, brand identity, digital art, and event branding. I've spent that time freelancing on Fiverr, working with clients who needed their brand to look sharper and get noticed faster.
bio2: My approach is simple: every piece should have a clear focal point, confident typography, and a mood that fits exactly where it's going to live, whether that's a phone feed, a boardroom screen, or a cinema wall.
bio3: I'm taking on new freelance projects directly. If you need identity, posters, campaign creatives, or a deck that makes people lean in, let's talk.

certifications.title: Social Media Marketing
certifications.details: Gained foundational skills in digital advertising and campaign creation across major social media platforms. Covered the strategy behind building effective social media marketing campaigns and the technical steps to design, structure, and launch targeted social media advertisements to reach specific audience demographics.

certifications.title: Advanced Prompt Engineering
certifications.details: Mastered advanced techniques for designing, optimizing, and structuring prompts to maximize the performance of Large Language Models (LLMs). Covered strategic prompt patterns, contextual formatting, and iterative refinement to elicit precise, high-quality, and context-aware AI outputs for complex workflows.

certifications.title: Introduction to Generative AI
certifications.details: Explored the core fundamentals of Generative AI, including how it differs from traditional machine learning methods. Covered the basics of large language models (LLMs), deep learning concepts, and how Google Cloud tools are utilized to develop and deploy creative AI solutions.

certifications.title: Introduction to Critical Infrastructure Protection
certifications.details: Introduced the core fundamentals of Critical Infrastructure Protection (CIP) and industrial cybersecurity. Covered the security standards and operational requirements needed to safeguard essential high-value systems, mitigate risks, and defend critical networks against evolving digital threats.

certifications.title: Business Analysis Basics
certifications.details: Covered the foundational principles of business analysis, focusing on understanding business needs, identifying strategic solutions, and bridging the gap between stakeholders and technical teams to drive project success.

certifications.title: Introduction to Web Development with ChatGPT
certifications.details: Explored the integration of AI-assisted workflows into modern frontend development. Covered the fundamentals of building web applications using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript while leveraging ChatGPT to accelerate code generation, optimize debugging, and streamline the design-to-development pipeline.

projects.title: Epilytix Brand Identity
projects.subtitle: Premium Brand Ecosystem & Visual Strategy
projects.details:
As the co-founder and lead designer of Epilytix, I needed to build a brand identity that felt tech-forward but distinctly human. The goal was to break away from standard, cold corporate tech aesthetics and craft a vibrant, premium ecosystem that signals innovation, fluid problem-solving, and authority in the software space.

Centered on the fluid "epx" monogram to symbolize seamless data flow, this versatile brand identity was stress-tested across diverse physical and digital mockups. The resulting adaptable design system perfectly positions Epilytix as an agile, cutting-edge software powerhouse.

projects.title: Isabeau Key Art
projects.subtitle: Dark Fantasy by Butterfly Entertainment
projects.details: To capture the epic scale of a high-end dark fantasy, I designed a character-driven key art piece featuring a layered triangular composition. The layout anchors on a piercing-eyed protagonist in the foreground, using symbolic wildlife, hooded figures, and a soaring raven to build narrative depth. Utilizing a desaturated, misty palette of cold blues and deep grays, the moody atmosphere makes the subtle eye glows and intricate, chiseled stone typography pop with a premium, high-fantasy aesthetic.

projects.title: Mind in Chaos
projects.subtitle: Cinematic Horror Key Art & Theatrical Poster Design
projects.details: My goal was to map fractured sanity onto a premium horror poster by contrasting the physical world with a predatory subconscious nightmare. I engineered a top-heavy vertical hierarchy, positioning a Nosferatu-inspired creature as a dominant psychological shadow over the characters. By flooding the midground with an ominous crimson glow and utilizing a distressed, heavily textured title treatment, the final composition delivers a visceral, high-end indie-horror aesthetic.

projects.title: The Horizon Hunter
projects.subtitle: Cinematic Product Key Art & Conceptual Automotive Poster
projects.details: To transform the Nissan GT-R into a theatrical experience, I built a dynamic vertical composition that stacks the vehicle's best design elements to tell a story of raw speed. Using a hyper-saturated, molten orange palette wrapped in heavy environmental smoke and golden backlighting, I gave the piece an aggressive, untamed edge. Grounding the car on a dark, wet asphalt texture allowed me to build high-contrast reflections, creating an incredibly premium and cinematic feel.
